mapper.sql: n.id, n.recipient_id, n.sender_id, n.notification_type, n.title, n.content, n.target_id, n.target_type, n.is_read, n.created_datetime, m.member_name as sender_name, m.member_handle as sender_handle, pf.file_path as sender_profile_image, p.post_content as post_content

from tbl_notification n left join tbl_member m on n.sender_id = m.id left join tbl_member_profile_file pf on m.id = pf.member_id and pf.profile_image_type = 'profile' left join tbl_post p on n.target_id = p.id and n.target_type = 'post'
mapper.select:
select
where n.recipient_id = #{recipientId} and n.notification_type = #{notificationType}::notification_type order by n.created_datetime desc
mapper.insert: insert into tbl_notification (recipient_id, sender_id, notification_type, title, content, target_id, target_type) values (#{recipientId}, #{senderId}, #{notificationType}::notification_type, #{title}, #{content}, #{targetId}, #{targetType})
mapper.update: update tbl_notification set is_read = true where recipient_id = #{recipientId} and is_read = false
mapper.select: select count(*) from tbl_notification where recipient_id = #{recipientId} and is_read = false
